answer: Castle, knight, loyalty, solemn, imposing, venerable. In the grand halls of a fortress, the weight of duty rests heavily upon the shoulders of a noble warrior. The flickering torchlight casts long shadows, whispering tales of honor and sacrifice amidst the ancient stone. A stillness pervades the air, echoing the solemn vows made long ago in the name of service.
